regional_cost_note: Electricians in Hastings typically charge $90–$115/hr + GST. Most require a minimum 1-hour callout. After-hours and emergency callouts add $60–$100. Solar installations typically start from $8,000–$12,000 for a residential system.

businesses.name: Mill Electrical
businesses.known_for: Havelock North family business with 40 years experience specialising in home automation, LED upgrades, hot water systems, underfloor heating and security systems.

businesses.name: Laser Electrical Hastings
businesses.known_for: Established in 1983, offering commercial maintenance, industrial automation, domestic renovations and 24/7 emergency electrical services across Hawke’s Bay.

businesses.name: Harkness Electrical
businesses.known_for: 30-year Hastings firm providing domestic, commercial and industrial electrical services with energy efficiency solutions and a 2-year labour warranty.

businesses.name: Best-Forsyth Electrical
businesses.known_for: Master Electricians specialist in switchboard design, manufacturing and process automation for commercial and industrial clients, serving Hawke’s Bay for 35+ years.

businesses.name: Zeus Solar and Electrical
businesses.known_for: Residential and commercial electrician based in Havelock North specialising in solar installations, new builds, renovations and electrical safety inspections.

businesses.name: Hillmac Electrical
businesses.known_for: Well-regarded Havelock North electricians known for reliable general residential work and heat pump installation.

businesses.name: Broad Electrical Services
businesses.known_for: Hastings-based contractor covering residential, commercial, industrial and agricultural irrigation electrical across Hawke’s Bay, with experience in council and large-scale projects.

businesses.name: Bruce Moroney Electrical
businesses.known_for: Domestic, commercial and industrial electricians with 20+ years experience and 24/7 emergency availability across Napier and Hastings.

businesses.name: Just Electrics
